title: Unknown CLI flags are silently ignored
body: parse() ignores unrecognised flags instead of returning an error, hiding user typos like --jsom.

title: JSON output does not escape paths
body: render() builds JSON by hand and would break if string fields are added. Switch to a real serializer.

title: Counter follows symlinks into loops
body: visit() recurses into symlinked directories which can cause infinite loops. Skip symlinks.

title: No way to ignore binary files
body: Binary files fail read_to_string and are skipped silently. Add an explicit --include-binary stat or warning.

title: Exit code is 0 even when path is missing
body: When the path does not exist, the tool prints zero stats and exits 0. It should exit non-zero.

title: Add per-extension breakdown
body: Users want line counts grouped by file extension, not just totals.

title: Help text missing
body: There is no --help output describing flags. Add usage text in the CLI parser.
